label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's think through this step-by-step. The instructions are to take 7 steps, then turn around, and then take 7 steps again. The question is whether following these instructions will bring you back to the starting point. First, when you take 7 steps in a straight line in one direction, you end up 7 steps away from the starting point in that direction. Then you turn around, which means you reverse your direction by 180 degrees. Now, you're facing the opposite direction from where you started. Taking 7 steps in this new direction will take you
